items.title: Meridian
content: Developer tool for visualizing API dependency graphs in real time. Surfaces hidden coupling in distributed service architectures before it becomes a production problem.

items.title: Stratum
content: Data pipeline orchestration dashboard for internal analytics teams. Makes complex ETL workflows legible to non-engineers without sacrificing depth.

items.title: Folio
content: Lightweight portfolio scaffolding CLI for engineers. Generates an opinionated project structure from a single config file.
